title: Office Calendar
excerpt: Is it possible to use Monday.com for a simple whole office (25 people) calendar? We are finding we need a way for people to enter weekly their office hours and not everyone uses just one calendar like Outlook or Google C…

posts.author: kstatz (Kate)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is it possible to use Monday.com for a simple whole office (25 people) calendar? We are finding we need a way for people to enter weekly their office hours and not everyone uses just one calendar like Outlook or Google Calendar.

So just wondering if there was a simple way to use Monday for this. TIA
